chapter_context.summary: The stone tablets are replaced; God reveals His character and renews the covenant.

outline.explanation: This section focuses on The New Tablets (34:1-9), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Exodus.
This section focuses on Covenant Renewed (34:10-28), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Exodus.
This section focuses on The Shining Face of Moses (34:29-35), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Exodus.

key_themes.title: Deliverance
key_themes.description: God's power in rescuing His people from bondage.

key_themes.title: Covenant Presence
key_themes.description: God dwelling among His people in the Tabernacle.

devotional.question: How can we 'stand still and see the salvation of the LORD' in our lives today?
What does the detail of the Tabernacle teach us about God's holiness and proximity?

cultural_historical.title: The Name of God
cultural_historical.text: The revelation of 'YHWH' (I AM) marks a turning point in God's relationship with Israel, signifying His self-existence and faithfulness.
